channel.title: Create on Notities
channel.description: Recent content in Create on Notities

item.title: Create a USB rEFIt boot disk
item.description:
# hdiutil convert /path/to/refit-0.14.cdr -format UDRW -o /path/to/refit-0.14.img
# diskutil list
# diskutil unmountDisk /dev/disk2
# sudo dd if=/path/to/refit-0.14.img.dmg of=/dev/rdisk2 bs=1m
Using rdisk2 here seems to speed up things

# diskutil eject /dev/disk2

item.title: Create a website for free with GitHub Pages
item.description:
Create a website for free with GitHub


P.S. Would you like somebody to help you? Feel free to send me a message on one of my Social Media Links available on this website.
